task_description: Implement Phase 10 (FINAL): Replace all remaining stub modules (XDR, SIEM, SOC, Cloud, Plugin, Updates, Sandbox, HIDS, Telemetry) with full production implementations including unit tests. After completion, zero stub modules should remain.

verification.summary: Build succeeds cleanly. All 1053 test cases pass (up from 824 baseline - 229 new tests added). All 9 Phase 10 modules fully implemented with zero stub references remaining. Post-review fixes applied for: SIEM time window enforcement, thread-safe timestamp handling, atomic plugin reload, proper JSON construction with nlohmann_json, consistent plain int counters.
